creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
Thanks Andy.

Please:

- Set maintainer-approval (flag) to + on attachments for ports you are maintainer of. Attachment -> Details -> maintainer-approval [+].

- Confirm this (and future changes) passes QA (portlint, poudriere, etc). For details, see: https://www.freebsd.org/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/books/porters-handbook/testing.html
